name: Louis Alter
abstract: Louis Alter (June 18, 1902 – November 3, 1980) was an American pianist, songwriter and composer. At 13, he began playing piano in theaters showing silent films.

concerts.label: Afternoon at Carnegie Hall to Benefit Music for the Blind
